title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Tontatta, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15 as the dwarves of Green Bit draw Usopp and Robin into their rebellion, believing Usopp is the legendary hero who will save them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Well if that's the case, fine

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: WE THOUGHT YOU WERE BAD FOR SURE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WHY DO THEY TRUST ME & SO EASILY

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Leo!! You idiot!! What're you doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Tonta- chief-sama! Turns out this person was good

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Well if that's the case, fine

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: THE MOST RESPECTED TONTACHIEF IN THE TONTATTA KINGDOM!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Never gotten such an up close and personal look at a big- human

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I... can't make it by 3. There's not enough time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Gancho-san... My baby den- den mushi....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ah... we returned it to the wild!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Well this is a problem... if you could just show me to the exit

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Wait!! Instead of that, if you're a good person then you'll give us weapons!! That's the rule!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: IF YOU DON'T, WE'LL STRIP YOU BARE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Eh... but I don't have any...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: That big-human is a good friend of the hero!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He's really a legendary hero who's come to help us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: usopp... what sort of lie did you tell...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Shut up, you! I'm in a hurry, here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the past

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Mama, that man is talking to himself

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm the one in a hurry!! If I don't make it ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Head to the flower fields, quickly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I got it ,so shut your trap!!

summary: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
